title: allium angulosum var. serotinum
intro: Allium angulosum var. serotinum, commonly known as late flowering wild garlic or autumn onion, is a perennial plant in the Allium genus. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to soothe and heal wounds, reduce swelling, and fight off infections. The health benefits of Allium angulosum var. serotinum include its ability to boost the immune system, lower blood pressure, and reduce the risk of certain diseases. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
